comments.comment:
The estimated amount of TRS released to land in 2013 was 0.000002 tonnes (or 2 x 10-6 tonnes).  This value was not entered into SWIM because it appears that SWIM only saves values to the 4th decimal point and as such, a value of 0.0000 tonnes would have been reported for 2013.   Please confirm if this understanding is correct and if an update in SWIM is required.    

The significant decrease in the estimated TRS released to land in 2013 (0.000002 tonnes) versus 2011 and 2012 (0.036 tonnes and 0.0592 tonnes respectively) is due to a decrease in the volume of produced water released containing Hydrogen Sulphide.
